topics_covered.title: AI Productivity Tools for Startups: A No-Fluff Founder's Guide

high_performing_structures: Introduction → Why Most AI Tool Roundups Get This Wrong → The Tools That Actually Stuck (By Category) → What Founders Get Wrong About AI Adoption → A Practical Stack for a 10-Person Startup → Conclusion
low_performing_patterns: Missing secondary keyword 'ChatGPT for business' — add to 'Content Operations' section
Only 2 internal links — add one more to related article
No FAQ section — missed featured snippet opportunity for 'what AI tools do startups use'

preferred_angles: Strong practical framing avoids generic listicle format
Concrete cost figures (£400-600/month stack) add credibility
Good use of H3 subheadings within 'Tools That Actually Stuck' section
Opinionated angle ('No-Fluff') differentiates from competitor content
3-point list in 'What Founders Get Wrong' section aids scannability
